subject: Yotsuyu, Acting Imperial Viceroy from Final Fantasy XIV — a woman in a black kimono-style garment holding a staff
description: A slender female figure stands in three-quarter view, dressed in a layered black kimono-style garment with a vivid red obi sash. She holds a thin staff or cane horizontally at shoulder level. Her long straight black hair falls past her shoulders, and a decorative blue flower ornament is visible at her temple. Her expression is cool and composed, bordering on imperious. Behind her, a large-scale ghost portrait of her face dominates the background, rendered in the same pale palette — the standard dual-layer FFTCG art treatment. The overall color palette is dominated by black, red, and pale skin tones.
foreground: Woman in black kimono with red obi, holding a staff horizontally
background: Pale warm wash with large ghost-face portrait of the same figure
emotion: cool, imperious — composed authority with a cold gaze
